rationale: CCC Domain A ("Curriculum Interpretation") and DigCompEdu 2.1 ("Selecting digital resources") both concern evaluating and selecting structured digital material for professional use. DigCompEdu 2.1 is framed generally (any digital teaching resource); CCC Domain A is specifically about interpreting machine-readable curriculum representations -- named as a gap DigCompEdu does not itself cover (see Framework connection notes.md's "What they largely do not specify... how teachers can work with machine-readable curricula"). Recorded as relatedMatch, not narrowMatch, because CCC Domain A is not simply DigCompEdu 2.1 applied to a narrower resource type -- it requires distinct conceptual-graph literacy (skos:broader/narrower relations, progression structures) that DigCompEdu 2.1 does not name.
subject: CCC-v1.0.0:OE-COMPETENCY-001000
